name: Gravy Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chicken fat in a large saucepan over low heat.
2. Add the flour and whisk until well combined and cooked lightly, stirring occasionally with a wooden spoon.
3. Gradually stir in the stock, continuing to whisk until it boils.
4. Lower the heat and simmer, covered, about 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Season the soup with salt and pepper.
6. Serve hot in heated bowls, topping each with croutons and sprinkled cheese.
